ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient's medical record */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social Security Number for identification */,
  "race" TEXT /* Patient's race for demographic analysis */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Patient's ethnicity for demographic analysis */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Patient's occupation */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "alcohol_usage" TEXT /* Alcohol usage (e.g., occasional, frequent) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number for the healthcare provider */,
  "medical_school" TEXT /* Name of the medical school */,
  "graduation_year" TEXT /* Year of graduation from medical school */,
  "board_certifications" TEXT /* Board certifications held by the provider */,
  "hospital_affiliations" TEXT /* Hospitals the provider is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_providers" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the patient and healthcare provider (e.g., primary care physician, specialist) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the patient-provider relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the patient-provider relationship */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the patient-provider relationship (e.g., transfer, referral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient taking the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for taking the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the allergy */,
  "allergen" TEXT /* Name of the allergen */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Type of reaction to the allergen */,
  "reaction_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the allergic reaction */,
  "allergy_type" TEXT /* Type of allergy */,
  "diagnosed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who diagnosed the allergy */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the allergy was diagnosed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allergy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allergy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allergies_diagnosed_by FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosed_by") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the laboratory result */,
  "lab_test" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the laboratory test */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the laboratory test was performed */,
  "lab_test_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the laboratory test */,
  "lab_test_description" TEXT /* Description of the laboratory test */,
  "result_units" TEXT /* Units for the laboratory result */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the laboratory result */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who performed the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider with the appointment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider making the referral */,
  "referred_to" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider being referred to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the referral */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the referral */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the referral */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the referral */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the referral record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the referral record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referred_to FOREIGN KEY ("referred_to") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the insurance policy */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the insurance policy */,
  "group_number" TEXT /* Group number of the insurance policy */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the insurance coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the insurance coverage */,
  "primary_insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary insurance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the insurance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the insurance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the billing record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the billing record */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the billing record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the billing item */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Service code for the billing item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the billing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the billing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the billing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the claim */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the claim */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_number" TEXT /* Unique claim number */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
